title: Tamannaah Bhatia, Sanjana Ganesan, Jay Shah Attend Rishab Rikhiram Sharma’s Ahmedabad Concert
description: Rishab Rikhiram Sharma was honoured with a handcrafted diamond portrait by Vipool Jepiwala, created using 11,000 diamonds over a month placing him alongside iconic figures such as Zakir Hussain and Narendra Modi to have received such a tribute.
